citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
The IACUC has not been reviewing the facility's program for humane care and use of animals at least once every six
months.
The facility has been reviewing the program annually (once per 12 months). A facility representative reported they were
unaware that the program for humane care and use of animals must be reviewed every 6 months per this section.
Regular reviews are necessary to ensure IACUC oversight of the facility's program for humane care and use of animals.
The IACUC shall review the facility's program for humane care and use of animals at least once every six months. Correct
by June 28, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.31(c)(1) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
The IACUC has not been reviewing the facility's program for humane care and use of animals at least once every six 
months.  
 
The facility has been reviewing the program annually (once per 12 months). A facility representative reported they were 
unaware that the program for humane care and use of animals must be reviewed every 6 months per this section. 
 
Regular reviews are necessary to ensure IACUC oversight of the facility's program for humane care and use of animals.  
 
The IACUC shall review the facility's program for humane care and use of animals at least once every six months. Correct 
by June 28, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. 
 
 n
